assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", identityServer.GetEndpoint("https")) or an equivalent expression using GetEndpoint
The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__ClientId", ...) with a client ID value
The web app passes at least one scope via .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Scopes__0", ...) using the double-underscore array indexing convention
assertions.rationale: Code shows Scopes__0, Scopes__1, Scopes__2 with openid, profile, weather.read

assertions.assertion: The API uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", ...) with GetEndpoint for the authority URL
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", identityServer.GetEndpoint("https"))` on the API

assertions.assertion: The code does NOT set IssuerUri unless explicitly needed
assertions.rationale: No IssuerUri is set, and the response explicitly warns against setting it unnecessarily
